title: Looking For Perfection
description: Looking For Perfection is a modpack that overhauls minecraft in performance and utility aspects, adding optifine features like shaders, zoom and connected textures while also having the wonderful mods created by the Fabric community.
body:
# Introduction
This modpack was created (as it's name sugests) to try to make Minecraft the best it possibly can using only client-side mods, initial release was made for 1.20 but i plan on updating it for future versions and i might create for some older versions as well depending on the feedback.

I mainly use Fabric so this modpack is only for Fabric, i won't be making a Forge version.

# Optifine
This modpack currently supports all main Optifine features like shaders, connected textures and zoom.

# Mods
This modpack currently has only client-side mods, which means you can use it in any server you want!

The mods that are currently in the modpack are:
- Alternate Current
- Animatica
- Achitectury API
- Borderless Mining
- Blur
- CIT Resewn
- Carpet
- Carpet Extra
- Carpet-Fixes
- Cloth Config API
- Continuity
- Custom Entity Models
- Don't Clear Chat History
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Entity Texture Features
- Fabric API (obviously)
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Freecam
- Gamma Utils
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Krypton
- LazyDFU
- Lithium
- Logical Zoom
- Mod Menu
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Replay Mod
- ShulkerBoxTooltip
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Starlight
- ToolTipFix
- YourOptionsShallBeRespected (YOSBR)

These are not all the mods i use, i also use [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining/versions)  and [ViaFabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric/versions) but i didn't add them to the modpack because i don't know if everyone would like to use them.
